summary: Iteration 144: COMPREHENSIVE AUDIO WIDGET AUDIT - All tests PASSED. Verified that all audio widgets throughout the app now use the global MixerContext instead of isolated AudioContexts. Key components tested: Quick Reset (Landing.js), SmartDock panels (Harmonics, Frequency, Mixer, Language), CosmicToolbar Deep Zen, Dashboard recommendations, Frequencies page, and Cosmic Mixer page.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All audio widgets now use global MixerContext. Quick Reset plays frequencies in place without navigation. CosmicToolbar Deep Zen activates 3 layers (528Hz + 174Hz + Ocean). SmartDock panels all functional. Cosmic Mixer page has all 12 sections. Dashboard recommendations show 'Tap to play instantly' badge for frequency recommendations.

quick_reset_landing_page.frequency_card_visible: PASS - Frequency card visible with 'Tap to play instantly' badge
quick_reset_landing_page.plays_in_place: PASS - Clicking frequency card plays audio WITHOUT navigating to /frequencies
quick_reset_landing_page.playing_state: PASS - Button changes to 'Playing — tap to stop' state
quick_reset_landing_page.stop_functionality: PASS - Clicking again stops the frequency

smartdock_harmonics_panel.panel_opens: PASS - Harmonics panel opens when clicking Moon/Cosmos icon
smartdock_harmonics_panel.plays_via_mixer_context: PASS - Frequency plays via MixerContext (shows Stop/Pause toggle)
smartdock_harmonics_panel.no_isolated_audio_context: PASS - Uses global MixerContext, not isolated AudioContext

smartdock_frequency_panel.panel_opens: PASS - Frequency panel opens when clicking Headphones/Tones icon
smartdock_frequency_panel.play_frequency: PASS - Clicking frequency plays via MixerContext
smartdock_frequency_panel.state_persistence: PASS - Frequency state persists across navigation

smartdock_language_panel.panel_opens: PASS - Language panel opens when clicking Globe icon

cosmic_toolbar_deep_zen.activates_3_layers: PASS - Deep Zen activates 528Hz + 174Hz + Ocean (3 layers)
cosmic_toolbar_deep_zen.uses_mixer_context: PASS - Uses global MixerContext, not isolated AudioContext
cosmic_toolbar_deep_zen.toast_notification: PASS - Toast shows 'Deep Zen activated - 528Hz + 174Hz + Ocean · 60 BPM'
cosmic_toolbar_deep_zen.stop_functionality: PASS - Clicking again stops meditation, toast shows 'Meditation ended'

components_using_mixer_context: MixerPanel (SmartDock.js) - uses useMixer() for volume, mute, stopAll
CosmicToolbar toggleMeditate - uses useMixer().toggleFreq and toggleSound
audio_widget_audit_summary.global_state_persistence: VERIFIED - Audio state persists across page navigation via MixerContext
audio_widget_audit_summary.no_isolated_audio_contexts: VERIFIED - All widgets use global MixerContext instead of creating isolated AudioContexts
